states.name: Alabama
states.sourceNotes: Alabama's official 2024-25 state assessment overview reports statewide Grade 3 ACAP ELA percentages for Levels 1 through 4. Published percentages sum to 99% because of rounding.

states.name: Alaska
states.sourceNotes: Alaska publishes exact statewide Grade 3 AK STAR ELA performance-level percentages in the 2025 assessment brief. The companion statewide results page reports the Grade 3 Advanced/Proficient share, enrollment, and participation rate. The published exact bins sum to 28.7 percent proficient or advanced, consistent with the results page's 28.68 percent.

states.name: Arizona
states.sourceNotes: Arizona's official AASA 2025 technical report, Table C.1, reports statewide Grade 3 ELA counts and percentages for all four performance levels.

states.name: Arkansas
states.sourceNotes: Arkansas publishes exact statewide Grade 3 ATLAS ELA performance-level percentages in the annual summary workbook.

states.name: California
states.sourceNotes: California's 2025 CAASPP ELA statewide Grade 3 workbook publishes WithScores and Standard Met/Exceeded only. The public workbook used here does not expose the full statewide performance-level split. The below-basic analog remains a not-met proxy defined here as 100 - Standard Met/Exceeded.

states.name: Colorado
states.sourceNotes: Exact tier percentages are reported directly in the Colorado CMAS statewide workbook.

states.name: Connecticut
states.sourceNotes: Connecticut EdSight's public Smarter Balanced report publishes the statewide Grade 3 ELA performance-level percentages directly for All Students. The saved extract also reports 36945.0 total students, 36719.0 tested, 36713.0 scored tests, and an average VSS of 2420.0.

states.name: Delaware
states.sourceNotes: Delaware's public statewide Grade 3 ELA rows expose a proficiency figure but not the full statewide performance-level split, so the below-basic analog is filled as 100 - Met Achievement Standard.

states.name: District of Columbia
states.sourceNotes: OSSE publishes exact statewide Grade 3 DC CAPE ELA performance levels on the Performance Level sheet. Those exact tiers are DC CAPE-only; OSSE's separate Meeting/Exceeding tab combines DC CAPE and MSAA, so its 30.4 percent proficiency figure is slightly above the DC CAPE-only Level 4+5 total. The companion all-tests Meeting/Exceeding row reports 30.4 percent proficient across DC CAPE plus MSAA.

states.name: Florida
states.sourceNotes: Florida publishes exact statewide Grade 3 FAST ELA PM3 percentages for Levels 1 through 5 in the statewide district workbook.

states.name: Georgia
states.sourceNotes: Georgia publishes exact statewide Grade 3 Georgia Milestones ELA performance-level percentages in the state summary workbook.

states.name: Hawaii
states.sourceNotes: Hawaii's official 2024-25 Smarter Balanced statewide workbook reports 49.9% of Grade 3 ELA students met or exceeded the achievement standard, but the state row used here does not publish the full performance-level split.

states.name: Idaho
states.sourceNotes: Idaho's official 2023-24 ISAT technical report publishes statewide Grade 3 ELA percentages for Levels 1 through 4. This one-year-older state result replaces the older federal proficiency proxy; published level percentages sum to 99% because of rounding.

states.name: Illinois
states.sourceNotes: Illinois's official 2025 Report Card public dataset reports statewide Grade 3 IAR ELA proficiency at 47.3%. The statewide row used here does not expose the full performance-level split.

states.name: Indiana
states.sourceNotes: Indiana publishes statewide Grade 3 ILEARN counts by performance level in the statewide summary workbook.

states.name: Iowa
states.sourceNotes: Iowa's official 2025 statewide assessment results report Grade 3 ELA proficiency at 68%. The public statewide summary used here does not expose the full performance-level split.

states.name: Kansas
states.sourceNotes: Kansas's official 2024-25 annual report publishes statewide Grade 3 ELA percentages for Kansas State Assessment Levels 1 through 4.

states.name: Kentucky
states.sourceNotes: Kentucky publishes exact Grade 3 Reading performance-level percentages in the KSA yearbook.

states.name: Louisiana
states.sourceNotes: Louisiana publishes exact statewide Grade 3 LEAP ELA achievement-level percentages in the State LEA achievement summary workbook.

states.name: Maine
states.sourceNotes: Maine's official Spring 2025 technical report, Table 8.2, publishes statewide Grade 3 Reading percentages for all four achievement levels.

states.name: Maryland
states.sourceNotes: Maryland Report Card's public 2025 MCAP English Language Arts endpoint publishes the statewide Grade 3 All Students performance-level percentages directly.

states.name: Massachusetts
states.sourceNotes: Massachusetts School and District Profiles publishes the statewide 2025 MCAS Grade 3 ELA achievement-level split directly on the state profile page, including Exceeding, Meeting, Partially Meeting, and Not Meeting Expectations. The page also reports the combined Meeting or Exceeding Expectations rate directly.

states.name: Michigan
states.sourceNotes: Michigan's official 2025 release reports 38.9% Proficient or Advanced and 24.6% Partially Proficient for Grade 3 M-STEP ELA. Not Proficient is the remaining 36.5%; the state release combines the two upper tiers.

states.name: Minnesota
states.sourceNotes: Minnesota's official 2025 public Reading MCA/MTAS workbook reports the statewide Grade 3 All Students row for Does Not Meet, Partially Meets, Meets, and Exceeds Standards. Percentages are based on 62,993 tested students.

states.name: Mississippi
states.sourceNotes: Mississippi publishes exact statewide Grade 3 MAAP ELA performance-level percentages in the 2025 executive summary PDF.

states.name: Missouri
states.sourceNotes: Missouri's official preliminary 2024-25 MAP results publish statewide Grade 3 ELA percentages for Below Basic, Basic, Proficient, and Advanced.

states.name: Montana
states.sourceNotes: Montana's official 2024-25 MAST technical report publishes statewide Grade 3 ELA counts and percentages for Novice through Advanced. Published percentages sum to 100.1% because of rounding.

states.name: Nebraska
states.sourceNotes: Nebraska Education Profile's official 2024-25 NSCAS ELA download reports the statewide Grade 3 All Students row for Developing, On Track, and Advanced. Published percentages sum to 100.01% because of rounding.

states.name: Nevada
states.sourceNotes: Nevada's official Accountability Portal reports the 2024-25 statewide Grade 3 ELA row for performance levels ED, AS, MS, and ES. Published percentages sum to 99.8% because of rounding.

states.name: New Hampshire
states.sourceNotes: New Hampshire's official iPlatform assessment report publishes the statewide 2025 Grade 3 NH SAS ELA proficiency rate. The public result used here exposes proficiency, not the full four-level statewide split. The below-basic analog remains a not-proficient proxy defined here as 100 - Percent Proficient.

states.name: New Jersey
states.sourceNotes: New Jersey publishes exact statewide Grade 3 NJSLA ELA performance-level percentages in the spring results workbook.

states.name: New Mexico
states.sourceNotes: New Mexico PED's official 2025 assessment presentation reports Grade 3 literacy proficiency at 41%. The Grade 3 public result used here does not expose the full NM-MSSA performance-level split.

states.name: New York
states.sourceNotes: NYSED Data Site's 2024-25 Report Card Database publishes All Public Schools statewide Grade 3 ELA counts and tested percentages for Levels 1 through 4 in the Annual EM ELA table.

states.name: North Carolina
states.sourceNotes: North Carolina's statewide Grade 3 reading row publishes Not Proficient plus Levels 3, 4, and 5. The Not Proficient bin aggregates Levels 1 and 2.

states.name: North Dakota
states.sourceNotes: North Dakota Insights' official 2024-25 Assessment Performance download reports the State of North Dakota Grade 3 Reading combined-assessment All Students row for Novice, Partially Proficient, Proficient, and Advanced.

states.name: Ohio
states.sourceNotes: Ohio School Report Cards publishes a statewide Title 1 Proficiency by Grade workbook with the Grade 3 English Language Arts Percent Proficient or Above value. The companion Title 1 Proficiency Levels workbook is statewide by student group rather than by grade, so Ohio remains an official proficiency-only source here. The below-basic analog remains a not-proficient proxy defined here as 100 - Percent Proficient or Above.

states.name: Oklahoma
states.sourceNotes: Oklahoma's official 2024-25 OSTP public CSV reports statewide Grade 3 ELA counts and percentages for Below Basic through Advanced.

states.name: Oregon
states.sourceNotes: Oregon's official 2024-25 statewide ELA workbook reports Grade 3 OSAS counts and percentages for Levels 1 through 4. Published percentages sum to 100.1% because of rounding.

states.name: Pennsylvania
states.sourceNotes: Pennsylvania's official assessment reporting page publishes statewide Grade 3 PSSA ELA percentages for Advanced, Proficient, Basic, and Below Basic directly in the public HTML table.

states.name: Rhode Island
states.sourceNotes: Rhode Island's public Assessment Data Portal publishes statewide Grade 3 RICAS ELA performance-level percentages directly for All Students. The saved extract also reports 9850.0 students tested and an average scale score of 490.0.

states.name: South Carolina
states.sourceNotes: South Carolina publishes exact statewide Grade 3 SC READY ELA performance-level percentages on the public state results page.

states.name: South Dakota
states.sourceNotes: South Dakota's official 2024-25 ELA and mathematics technical report, Table 23, publishes statewide Grade 3 ELA percentages for Levels 1 through 4. Published percentages sum to 101% because of rounding.

states.name: Tennessee
states.sourceNotes: Tennessee publishes exact statewide Grade 3 TCAP ELA tier percentages in the state assessment file.

states.name: Texas
states.sourceNotes: Texas publishes cumulative threshold rates, so exact tiers are derived by subtraction from the statewide TAPR Grade 3 STAAR export.

states.name: Utah
states.sourceNotes: Utah State Board of Education's official 2025 RISE/Utah Aspire Plus proficiency-level workbook reports the State Grade 3 Language Arts row for Below Proficient through Highly Proficient. Published percentages sum to 99.7%.

states.name: Vermont
states.sourceNotes: Vermont's official 2025 General Assessment open dataset reports the State of Vermont Grade 3 ELA All Students values for Substantially Below Proficient, Partially Proficient, Proficient, and Proficient with Distinction.

states.name: Virginia
states.sourceNotes: Virginia School Quality Profiles publishes statewide Grade 3 English Reading percentages for Advanced, Proficient, Passed, and Failed. Failed is used here as the below-basic analog because the public source does not split non-passing students into finer statewide tiers.

states.name: Washington
states.sourceNotes: Washington publishes statewide Grade 3 SBAC ELA level shares as fractions of all expected students, so the exact tier percentages here are renormalized on a tested-only denominator.

states.name: West Virginia
states.sourceNotes: West Virginia's public statewide Grade 3 ELA materials expose proficiency but not the full statewide performance-level split, so the below-basic analog is filled as 100 - Meets Standard or above.

states.name: Wisconsin
states.sourceNotes: Wisconsin publishes statewide Grade 3 Forward ELA percentages on a denominator that includes No Test, so the exact tier percentages here are renormalized on a tested-only denominator.

states.name: Wyoming
states.sourceNotes: Wyoming's official statewide assessment guidance reports Grade 3 ELA proficiency at 48%. This 2023-24 state result replaces the older federal proxy; the public reference used here does not expose the full WY-TOPP performance-level split.

downloads.label: Dashboard results
downloads.description: One concise row per state or jurisdiction.

downloads.label: Coverage tracker
downloads.description: Source quality, assessment, year, and notes for all jurisdictions.

downloads.label: Below-basic analog
downloads.description: Cross-state analytical measure and source fields.

downloads.label: Published source bins
downloads.description: State-published tiers, bins, or proficiency values.

downloads.label: Exact state tiers
downloads.description: Long-form exact performance tiers where available.

downloads.label: NAEP Grade 4 Reading
downloads.description: 2024 achievement levels and Below Proficient for every state and DC, with the national benchmark.
